Overrides.Override: Elusive's Effect on you is increased instead for the first 2 seconds Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Agile
15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
10% reduced Attributes 40% increased Global Defences Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Fortress
Enemies Poisoned by you have 10% of Physical Damage they deal converted to Chaos Limited to 1 Runegraft of Rotblood

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Bino's Kitchen Knife Slaughter Knife Unique ID: dba52ac84d5e022b735a3a3d9a88e2f6d72b22490cc5f85ce611e644791c12cc Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-B-B LevelReq: 58 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Quality does not increase Physical Damage {crafted}+0.1 metres to Weapon Range per 10% Quality 30% increased Global Critical Strike Chance Adds 142 to 235 Physical Damage 42% increased Critical Strike Chance +17% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier +24% to Chaos Resistance On Killing a Poisoned Enemy, Enemies within 3 metres are Poisoned, and you and Allies Regenerate 400 Life per second for the Poison's duration if within 3 metres
